DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS EDGAR GUZMAN AND COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY AND APPEARANCE AT DEPOSITION AND FOR MONETARY AND TERMINATING SANCTIONS: THE MOTION IS UNOPPOSED AND IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL WITHIN 10 DAYS PROVIDE WRITTEN RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY AND APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION AT A TIME AND PLACE TO BE SET BY DEFENDANT. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF FOR $928. DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT EDGAR GUZMAN, COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY AND APPEARANCE AT DEPOSITION AND FOR MONETARY AND TERMINATING SANCTIONS. DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED COMPLETELY TO COMPLY WITH THE DISCOVERY ACT AND THE COURT'S PRIOR ORDER. THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO AWARD MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $711.00 AND FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS. PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 DIRECTLY BY EMAIL TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT JULIA@CAMPINSBENHAMBAKER.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: JULIA CAMPINS, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-06-2019 Dismissal - No Appearance

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery And Appearance At Deposition And For Monetary And Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EDGAR GUZMAN, COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery And Appearance At Deposition And For Monetary And Terminating Sanctions.

Defendant's Motion is granted. Plaintiff has failed completely to comply with the Discovery Act and the Court's prior order. The Court finds good cause to award monetary sanctions in the amount of $711.00 and for terminating sanctions.

Prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 directly by email to the Judge Pro Tem at julia@campinsbenhambaker.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Julia Campins, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery And Appearance At Deposition And For Monetary And Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs EDGAR GUZMAN and COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery And Appearance At Deposition And For Monetary And Terminating Sanctions

The motion is unopposed and is granted. Plaintiff shall within 10 days provide written responses to discovery and appear for deposition at a time and place to be set by Defendant. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff for $928.

Proposed Order submitted to JPT electronically and pending original signature for filing.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Set For Trial On May-06-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Emrani, Esq. 31-273-1230 of Carpenter Zuckerman & Rowley LLP for Moving party through Court Call.
Jose Montalvo, Esq. 925-945-4218 of the Law office of John Biard for Defendant Edgar Guzman through Court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

THE LAW OFFFICE OF CARPENTER, ZUCKERMAN, & ROWLEY LLP AND ATTORNEY STEVEN L. MAZA'S MOTION TO BE RELEIVED AS COUNSE FOR PLAINTIFF DEMETRICE WITHERSPOON.

Granted. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
